- Critical parameters:

condition_task: List all available Spotify API endpoints related to playlist management and their descriptions.
compressed_context:
- Playlist management endpoints:  
  - `show_playlist_library`: GET /library/playlists – List user playlists; requires `access_token`. Parameters: `access_token`, `is_public`, `page_index`.  
  - `show_playlist`: GET /playlists/{playlist_id} – Get playlist details; requires `access_token` and `playlist_id`.  
  - `show_song`: GET /songs/{song_id} – Get song details; includes `rating`, `like_count`, `play_count`.  
  - `create_playlist`: POST /playlists – Create new playlist; requires `title`, `access_token`; optional `is_public`.  
  - `add_song_to_playlist`: POST /playlists/{playlist_id}/songs/{song_id} – Add song to playlist; requires `playlist_id`, `song_id`, `access_token`.  

All endpoints require valid `access_token`. Ratings are available in `show_song` response. Playlist IDs (e.g., 457, 458, 654) and song IDs (e.g., 99, 164) are preserved. Failed login due to syntax error resolved via proper escaping. Access token obtained from login with email "ashlee_martinez@gmail.com" and password "N(y4vRP".
